name: Carl Dorrough

contactInfo.office: 101 E. Methvin St., Suite 330, Longview, TX 75601

bio: Carl Dorrough serves as the District Attorney for Gregg County, overseeing felony prosecutions in the Longview area. He leads efforts to combat crime and ensure justice is served for all Gregg County residents.
campaignPromises: Aggressively prosecute violent crime in the Longview area
Target drug trafficking and distribution networks
Advocate for the rights of crime victims
Run an efficient and transparent DA's office
Strengthen relationships with local law enforcement agencies
